overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic urban underpass in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), transitioning from a covered graffiti-lined alley to an open multi-level highway with the Pacifica district signage. The camera moves steadily forward as futuristic vehicles pass by on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban alley with graffiti walls

events.description: trash bags exit bottom of frame as camera moves forward
entering deeper shade of the underpass as overhead structure blocks sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a road, passing trash bags and approaching a covered underpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic red car driving away from camera down the road

entered.detail: pile of garbage bags on the sidewalk at the starting position
tall red concrete wall with weathered texture lining the left side
tall red concrete wall with yellow graffiti markings on the right side
spray-painted yellow symbol on the right wall
black metal lamppost on the sidewalk edge
large advertisement billboard mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view of trash bags on a concrete sidewalk between two red concrete walls covered in graffiti. The camera walks forward past the garbage and along the sidewalk, approaching a covered underpass while futuristic vehicles drive by on the adjacent road.

events.description: passing the street lamp and entering the fully covered section of the underpass
large colorful murals become visible on both walls of the underpass

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered underpass, passing under the ceiling structure

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving through the underpass ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large mural of a figure in green clothing painted on the left wall
colorful abstract banner-like mural with geometric patterns on the right wall
concrete ceiling with recessed lighting covering the roadway
low concrete divider separating the sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the fully enclosed underpass section with artificial lighting and a concrete ceiling. Large murals are painted on both walls - a green figure on the left and abstract banners on the right. Vehicles continue to pass by on the road to the left, separated by a concrete barrier.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with city skyline

events.description: passing under the overhead Pacifica directional signs and exiting the covered underpass
emerging from shadow into bright direct sunlight as the camera exits the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking out of the underpass into the open highway area, continuing forward along the road edge

notable_agents.action: white car driving ahead on the highway toward the city center

entered.detail: overhead highway signs with 'PACIFICA' text and directional arrows
multi-level highway ramps and overpass structures
futuristic city buildings and skyscrapers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the underpass beneath overhead signs marking the Pacifica district, transitioning from enclosed artificial lighting to bright open sunlight. The view opens up to reveal a complex multi-level highway interchange with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the city skyline ahead. The red wall continues on the right while the left side opens to show highway ramps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a gritty, enclosed urban alleyway into a vast, sun-drenched highway interchange. It begins on a concrete sidewalk flanked by red graffiti-covered walls and piles of trash, moving steadily toward a covered underpass as futuristic vehicles stream past on an adjacent road. As the camera enters the underpass, the environment shifts to a fully enclosed space defined by artificial lighting and large murals of green figures and abstract banners. The scene then opens abruptly as the camera passes beneath Pacifica district signage, transitioning from the dim tunnel into bright, open sunlight. Finally, the view expands to reveal a complex multi-level highway system and a distant skyline of futuristic skyscrapers, with the red wall persisting on the right while the left side opens toward sprawling highway ramps.
